Change 1: Replace:
  # Build entity relationships to create connected sentences
      entity_info = {}
      all_subjects = set()
      all_objects = set()
  
      for triple in triples:
          subj = triple.subject
          pred = triple.predicate.lower()
          obj = triple.object
  
          all_subjects.add(subj)
          all_objects.add(obj)
  
          if subj not in entity_info:
              entity_info[subj] = []
          entity_info[subj].append((pred, obj))
  
      # Find main subject (athlete or most connected entity)
      main_subject = max(entity_info.keys(), key=lambda s: len(entity_info[s]))
with:
  # Build entity relationships to create connected sentences
      entity_info = {}
      all_subjects = set()
      all_objects = set()
      subject_to_objects = {}  # Maps subject to its objects for entity linking
  
      for triple in triples:
          subj = triple.subject
          pred = triple.predicate.lower()
          obj = triple.object
  
          all_subjects.add(subj)
          all_objects.add(obj)
          subject_to_objects[subj] = subject_to_objects.get(subj, [])
          subject_to_objects[subj].append(obj)
  
          if subj not in entity_info:
              entity_info[subj] = []
          entity_info[subj].append((pred, obj))
  
      # Find main subject (athlete or most connected entity)
      main_subject = max(entity_info.keys(), key=lambda s: len(entity_info[s]))
